rows.changes: user and Engg frame change from DVRF to IVRF
In Config upload and download reply frame, IVRF identifier added

1.New IDU capacities added in "User frame", "IDU Parameter", "Configuration Upload", "Configuration Download" sheets.
2.IDU Backup mode command added in "ODU-IDU Normal Comm" sheet.
3.Filter Reset command added in"IDU Parameters Upload" Sheet.
1. Added Capcity codes for different capacities of SIAM compressor

Communication Sequence details added.
For 6th Gen VRF - Fan Drive parameters & New sensor added in Engineering frame.

Compressor Drive Firmware verision added in Engineering Frame in future use bytes.
ODUm-ODUs Communication protocol updated for all above parameter.

1. Fan Drive 2 parameters added in ODUm-ODUs Communication protocol
2. Byte values added based on VRF V Plus firmware in ODUm-ODUs Communication protocol.
3. Oil Level Byte value added in Engineering Frame.

1. Oil Level values defination changed in Engineering Frame & ODUm-ODUs frame.
2. Comp. Drive FW version format changed to Hex instead of ASCII in Engineering Frame & ODUm-ODUs frame.
1. Oil Level values defination changed in Engineering Frame & ODUm-ODUs frame.

1. Reverse Rotation command added between Master & Slave.
2. Slave Ambient Protection State added between Master & Slave in Reserved Byte.

1. In IVRF Engineering frame,For 6th gen, Oil temp 1, Oil temp 2, Suction temp, Fan Drive 1 current, Fan Drive 2 current after decimal conversion value to be divided by 10
2. In IVRF Engineering frame, For 5th & 6th gen, Liq Inj, parameter description of 0,1 and 2 level added
3. In IVRF Engineering frame, For 6th gen, Protections CP1, CP2, IT1, IT2 added
Added IDU Model type of 1-way CST identification

fields.parameter:
Master Protections 
CP1, CP2, IT1, IT2
fields.description:
Range: (0 – 150)d=(0-096)h (0x30,0x30,0x30 – 0x30,0x39,0x36)ASCII
Unsigned int
Bit 0 : CP1 : 0 = OFF, 1= ON
Bit 1 : CP2 : 0= OFF, 1= ON
Bit 2 : IT1 : 0= OFF,1= ON
Bit 3 : IT2 : 0= OFF, 1= ON
Bit 4 to Bit 8 reserved
fields.notes:
Bit 0 : CP1 : 0 = OFF, 1= ON
Bit 1 : CP2 : 0= OFF, 1= ON
Bit 2 : IT1 : 0= OFF,1= ON
Bit 3 : IT2 : 0= OFF, 1= ON
Bit 4 to Bit 8 reserved

Example: CP1 = ON, CP2 = ON, IT1 = OFF, IT2 = ON
the byte becomes: (00001011)b = (B)h. In this case, send value in ASCII as 'B'.
